maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday August 30, 2018 at 20:30

did.unittitle: Yale Freshman Crew - Logbook and Boat Club Records

originalsloc.head: Existence and Location of Originals
originalsloc.p: The entire collection can be located in the Yale Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Crew (RU 121). The records consist of logbooks, scrapbooks, correspondence, profiles, and ephemera of the Yale crew team. Also included is a memoir of Archie Monroe Quarrier who, as a member of the Yale crew team, participated in the 1924 Olympics in Paris. Note: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-B (YRG 38-B), Records documenting specific sports at Yale.
Crew scrapbooks, 1916-1935 are available on microfilm from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no. HM162.
1983 and 1985. 4389 frames on 5 reels, 35mm. Crew logbook, 1881-1905 is available on microfilm from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no. HM163.

1983. 393 frames on 1 reel, 35mm. Logbook of freshman crew, 1893 (along with boat club records) is also available on microfilm (230 frames on 1 reel, 35mm.) from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no. HM161.
Logbook of the Yale crew, 1903-1938 is also available on microfilm (381 frames on 1 reel, 35mm.) from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no. HM79.
